title: Relationship preservation human moment
prompt: Create a 16:9 light premium abstract human relationship preservation visual for TSI. Elegant editorial illustration, not photorealistic stock photography. A calm professional service moment represented through semi-abstract silhouettes, customer communication paths, and trust signals on a white/warm-neutral foundation. TSI dark blue #001E41 linework, TSI bright blue #4396F6 highlights, soft blue tint shadows, very subtle gradient atmosphere. Professional, humane, respectful, modern, sophisticated. Leave upper-left logo-safe area and copy-safe space. No logos, no readable text, no distressed consumers, no debt-shame imagery, no medical or legal threats, no fake data, no watermarks.
notes: Broader human visual lane; not a replacement for official people illustrations.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
